memberdef.argsstring: (self, str line, Optional[LineMetadata] metadata=None, Optional[List[Annotation]] annotations=None, str uid=None)
memberdef.name: __init__

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Initialize line with raw text, optional metadata, annotations, and auto-generated UID.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Uses\/ \: uuid.uuid1 \par \b I/O\/ \: (str, Optional[LineMetadata], Optional[List[Annotation]], Optional[str]) -> None \par \b Complexity\/ \: 3

:param line: raw text of the document line :param metadata: metadata (related to the entire line, as line or page number, its hierarchy level) :param annotations: metadata that refers to some part of the text, for example, font size, font type, etc. :param uid: unique identifier of the line

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Return length of the raw text line.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: None -> int \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Compare lines by raw text for ordering.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: (LineWithMeta) -> bool \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Split this line by separator, keeping annotations consistent using regex boundary detection.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Uses\/ \: re \par \b I/O\/ \: str -> List[LineWithMeta] \par \b Complexity\/ \: 6
Split this line into a list of lines, keep annotations consistent. This method does not remove any text from the line.
:param sep: separator for splitting :return: list of split lines

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Slice line with annotation consistency.

detaileddescription.para: Supports int index and slice (start:stop). \par \b Uses\/ \: __extract_annotations_by_slice \par \b I/O\/ \: (Union[slice, int]) -> LineWithMeta \par \b Complexity\/ \: 6

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Get raw text of the document line.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: None -> str \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1
Raw text of the document line

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Get line metadata (page ID, line ID, hierarchy level).

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: None -> LineMetadata \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1
Line metadata related to the entire line, as line or page number, hierarchy level

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Get list of annotations (font size, font type, etc.).

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: None -> List[Annotation] \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1
Metadata that refers to some part of the text, for example, font size, font type, etc.

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Get unique identifier of the line.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: None -> str \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1
Unique identifier of the line

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Set raw text of the line.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: str -> None \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1
\par \b I/O\/ \: LineMetadata -> None \par \b Complexity\/ \: 1

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Return repr with truncated text and hierarchy level info.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: None -> str \par \b Complexity\/ \: 2

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Concatenate two LineWithMeta or a LineWithMeta with a string, merging annotations.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Uses\/ \: AnnotationMerger \par \b I/O\/ \: (Union[LineWithMeta, str]) -> LineWithMeta \par \b Complexity\/ \: 6

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Convert line with metadata to API schema, serializing annotations.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Uses\/ \: ApiLineWithMeta \par \b I/O\/ \: None -> ApiLineWithMeta \par \b Complexity\/ \: 3

memberdef.argsstring: (self, int shift_x, int shift_y, int image_width, int image_height)
memberdef.name: shift

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Shift bounding box annotations by given deltas and update relative coordinates.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Uses\/ \: BBoxAnnotation, json \par \b I/O\/ \: (int, int, int, int) -> None \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Join list of LineWithMeta with a delimiter, keeping annotations consistent via deepcopy and concatenation.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Uses\/ \: deepcopy \par \b I/O\/ \: (List[LineWithMeta], str) -> LineWithMeta \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
Join list of lines with the given delimiter, keep annotations consistent. This method is similar to the python built-it join method for strings.
:param lines: list of lines to join :param delimiter: delimiter to insert between lines :return: merged line

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Extract annotations that overlap with the given slice, adjusting their start/end positions.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b I/O\/ \: (int, int) -> List[Annotation] \par \b Complexity\/ \: 4
Extract annotations for given slice.

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Structural unit of document — a line (or paragraph) of text with metadata and annotations.

detaileddescription.para: Supports slicing, joining, and splitting with annotation consistency.

Structural unit of document - line (or paragraph) of text and its metadata. One LineWithMeta should not contain text from different logical parts of the document (for example, document title and raw text of the document should not be in the same line). Still the logical part of the document may be represented by more than one line (for example, document title may consist of many lines).
